description: Welcome to Highland Ridge, a wonderful place to call home for growing families. This inviting, end unit townhome offers three spacious bedrooms upstairs plus a versatile lower-level fourth bedroom, ideal flex space for an office or guests. A bright, open-concept kitchen sits at the heart of the home, perfect for family meals and gatherings, flowing seamlessly into a cozy living room and out to a large private deck where parents can unwind or entertain. Pride of ownership shines with thoughtful updates - new ensuite bathroom, refreshed counters, & new stove. Set in a well-kept, family-friendly complex steps from schools (Walnut Grove/James Kennedy), parks, community centre, & all amenities. Come see why this special home is one your family will love for years to come.
